2026-06-09.content: * Updated macOS Python Virtualenv for the `gcloud` CLI to 3.14.5 with pyOpenSSL 26.0.0 and cryptography 46.0.7.

summary.title: gcloud CLI updates
summary.summary: The gcloud CLI has been updated with new versions of Python, pyOpenSSL, and cryptography. This update ensures the CLI is running with the latest security patches and performance improvements.

2026-06-09.content: * Fixed `gcloud ai endpoints deploy-model` to honor `--machine-type` for Gemini on GDC connected deployments. Previously the flag was silently ignored.

summary.title: AI model deployment fix
summary.summary: A recent update corrects an issue where the `--machine-type` flag was ignored during AI model deployments for Gemini on GDC connected deployments. This fix ensures the specified machine type is now correctly applied, improving deployment control and resource allocation.

2026-06-09.content:
* Updated the Java SDK to version 5.0.3 build from the open source project
  <https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/appengine-java-standard/releases/tag/v5.0.3>.
* Fixed for <https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/appengine-java-standard/issues/503>.

summary.title: App Engine Java SDK Updated
summary.summary: The Java SDK for App Engine has been updated to version 5.0.3, incorporating the latest changes from the open-source project. This update also includes a fix for issue 503.

2026-06-09.content:
* Added validation to enforce required sub-fields within arguments for releases,
  unit-kinds, and unit-operations commands.

summary.title: App Lifecycle Manager Updates
summary.summary: App Lifecycle Manager now includes validation for required sub-fields in release, unit-kind, and unit-operation commands. This ensures data integrity and improves command usability.

2026-06-09.content: * Modified `--group-key` flag of `gcloud access-context-manager cloud-bindings create` to be optional.

summary.title: Cloud Access Context Manager group key update
summary.summary: The `--group-key` flag for creating cloud bindings in Access Context Manager is now optional. This change provides more flexibility when configuring access policies.

2026-06-09.content:
* Remove deprecated from Extended Attributes parameters.
  Extended Attributes are marked as restricted.

summary.title: Extended Attributes Update
summary.summary: Deprecated parameters have been removed from Extended Attributes, and these attributes are now marked as restricted. This change enhances security and simplifies attribute management.

2026-06-09.content: * Added `gcloud beta workstations update` command to update a workstation's properties, such as its persistent directory disk size.

summary.title: Update Cloud Workstations properties
summary.summary: You can now update workstation properties, including persistent directory disk size, using the `gcloud beta workstations update` command. This allows for more flexible management of your development environments.

2026-06-09.content: * Added support for updating Slurm prolog, epilog, task prolog, and task epilog scripts.

summary.title: Update Slurm Scripts
summary.summary: Cluster Director now supports updating Slurm prolog, epilog, task prolog, and task epilog scripts. This enhancement allows for more flexible and dynamic management of your Slurm workload execution.

2026-06-09.content:
* Added `EXTERNAL_PASSTHROUGH` option to `--load-balancing-scheme` flag of `gcloud compute forwarding-rules` in beta.
* Promoted `--ip_addresses` flag of `gcloud compute forwarding-rules` to beta.
* Added `EXTERNAL_PASSTHROUGH` option to `--load-balancing-scheme` flag of `gcloud compute backend-services` in beta.
* Added folder share support to `gcloud compute reservations update`.
* Promoted `--ncc-gateway` flag to GA.

summary.title: Compute Engine Updates
summary.summary: New options for forwarding rules and backend services are now available in beta, including external passthrough load balancing. Folder share support has been added to reservations, and the NCC gateway flag is now generally available.

2026-06-09.content:
* Added support for seeding a conversion workspace from a Cloud Storage bucket
  via `--gcs-path` flag in `gcloud database-migration conversion-workspaces
  seed`.
* Added `--dry-run` flag to `gcloud database-migration conversion-workspaces
  apply` to allow validation of apply process by applying the draft version to
  a copy of the destination database.
* Decoupled `--host` and `--port` requirements in `gcloud database-migration
  connection-profiles create postgresql` for destination connection profiles
  leveraging Cloud SQL or AlloyDB.

summary.title: Database Migration Enhancements
summary.summary: New features for database migration include seeding from Cloud Storage, dry-run validation for applying changes, and more flexible connection profile creation for PostgreSQL, especially when using Cloud SQL or AlloyDB.

2026-06-09.content:
* Added `--maintenance-window-duration` flag to `gcloud container clusters create` command as an alternative to `--maintenance-window-end`.
* Added `--maintenance-window-duration` flag to `gcloud container clusters update` command as an alternative to `--maintenance-window-end`.

summary.title: New flag for maintenance windows
summary.summary: You can now specify the duration of maintenance windows when creating or updating Kubernetes clusters. This provides more flexibility in managing cluster maintenance schedules.

2026-06-09.content:
* Promoted `gcloud network-connectivity spokes gateways advertised-routes`
  command group to GA, including `create`, `delete`, `describe`, and `list`
  commands.

summary.title: Network Connectivity GA Commands Released
summary.summary: The `gcloud network-connectivity spokes gateways advertised-routes` command group, including create, delete, describe, and list commands, has been promoted to General Availability. This release enhances network connectivity management capabilities.

2026-06-09.content:
* Promoted project scoping for
  `gcloud network-security firewall-endpoints` commands
  (`create`, `delete`, `describe`, `list`, `update`) to GA.

summary.title: Firewall Endpoint Commands Reach General Availability
summary.summary: The `gcloud network-security firewall-endpoints` commands, including create, delete, describe, list, and update, have been promoted to General Availability. This enhancement improves project scoping for managing firewall endpoints.

summary.title: New Security Detection Available
summary.summary: We've expanded Security Command Center's capabilities by adding the 'external-exposure' service. This enhancement allows for more comprehensive security monitoring and threat detection within your environment.

2026-06-09.content: * Updated import and export schemas for `gcloud service-extensions authz-extensions`.

summary.title: Service Extensions schema updates
summary.summary: We have updated the import and export schemas for `gcloud service-extensions authz-extensions`. These changes ensure better compatibility and flexibility when managing authorization extensions.

2026-06-09.content:
* Added `--image-family` flag to `gcloud workbench instances upgrade`.
* Added `NVIDIA_RTX6000` to `--accelerator-type` choices on `gcloud workbench instances create` and `update`.

Subscribe to these release notes at <https://groups.google.com/forum/#!forum/google-cloud-sdk-announce>.

summary.title: Workbench Instance Enhancements
summary.summary: The latest Workbench release introduces an --image-family flag for instance upgrades and expands accelerator options to include NVIDIA_RTX6000 for instance creation and updates. Stay informed about future updates by subscribing to our release notes.
